reviews.review_description: Between the 10 dollar price tag and overwhelmingly positive reviews, i had high expectations and felt very let down. Feels more like a 5 dollar game for me, due to the lack of depth. Theres plenty of missions, 60 ij fact. But its so repetitive i find myself not wanting to play them all- similar to the gunjack missions i never finished. And i liked gunjack better than this

Yeah, you probably support the official Samsung controller that isn't even being produced anymore, but with this havoc of Android controllers, assignable buttons is a must.
Support that and you'll get 5 stars. Right now i can barely play with my steel series controller cause the axis is inverted vertically.

I purchased the Rift version at launch and very much enjoyed it. When I saw it for sale on GearVR for 0.99 cents, I had to give it a try. I am glad I did. It is amazing how the devs where able to deliver such a great game to a phone. It is easily worth the regular asking price. 
I would like to add that I have had no problems with gamepad support.
I think the developers must add some form of story. It does help a lot and keep ppl playing.
This was my first purchase and I have really enjoyed playing it.  I like hack n slash games so suits me.  Any major updates due?
I love the layout and the feel of the old beat'em up console feel. Looking forward to more like this.

As other reviews say: the game lacks any depth. You run around the same arena in every level, without any story or character progression (outside of boring ~5% stat increases). The game looks very pretty and handles nice, but there is not a lot to it.

Also, on controller side: I use an ipega controller and it worked without any problem.

reviews.review_title: The battle love it make more.
reviews.review_description: Love itddcfhh
This game reminds me of Meltdown on Steam, which I bought for the VR support but it later lost. It's a fun brawler that is really helped by being in VR

For a game which has achievement system both on google play and on steam, the gearvr edition does not have achievement system however, though oculus supports achievement system now. I have finished the challenge mode on the google play version getting all 3 stars, so I would like to unlock some achievement on this version as well, which will be shown in my oculus profile. On the other hand, online leaderboard may also be a good idea, providing players a way to compete with each other.The battle system is great, and I believe that keep developing this game and putting new content in it is definitely worthwhile…may attract many more players.
The VR experience is incredibly. Game play is fun. Graphic is beautiful. Love it.
i think is the best vr game i ve experienced in gear vr yet

reviews.review_title: Shows what gear vr is capable of.
reviews.review_description: Simple bashem up game, but the great graphics and the experience of playing while inside vr , in the arena,makes it great.

reviews.review_title: This game supports almost any controller
reviews.review_description: Used with xbox one controller, gamesir, and steel series!
wish it was first person
Can you make a new one? It's been a while :)
Needs more. Where is all our paid DLC?

reviews.review_title: Not for everyone, but good for me.
reviews.review_description: Had this game for a hot min and decided to finally give my review. I'm a huge fan of anything that is like a side scrolling beat em up. From Final Fight on SNES to Streets Of Rage on Genesis. I can never really get bored with them. So when I saw this it was a must grab for me. I enjoy the game very much so. Sure it is repetitive, but a lot of games are. With the upgrades and customizing you can do, it at least gives you something to work for. Using a PS3 controller and have no problems whatsoever. And can get about 30+ mins of play with no overheating issue thanks to the Asterion Satori VR Fan for my Gear VR. The only issue I have with it, and honestly I haven't played it in a while so it might be fixed, but the sound sometimes go completely out. I would have to restart the game to get my sound back.  So, because of that it loses a star. But I'm about to take a crack at it, and if it is fixed, I'll update the star. Other than that, very fun game to me.
Just add multi-player and I'm good, it be funner playing with other people taking on the harder levels, or just add a whole new challenge mode.

reviews.review_title: Casual arcade action with nice graphics
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this game. I liked the graphics and the easy controls. I wish the level designs are were not so repetitive. Also, FYI at higher levels it becomes harder.
